pi_items.source: Task setup scripts launch Firefox and navigate to https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real CAMEO Chemicals database (NOAA) to assess groundwater contamination risk for five industrial chemicals. Sodium Hydroxide has the highest water solubility (1000 mg/mL), far exceeding the HIGH risk threshold of >50 mg/mL, making it the highest-risk chemical among the five. The other chemicals have the following risk profiles: Phenol (50-100 mg/mL, HIGH), Benzene (1-5 mg/mL, MEDIUM), Trichloroethylene (<1 mg/mL, LOW), and Carbon Tetrachloride (<1 mg/mL, LOW). All five chemicals are correctly identified with verified CAS numbers. The risk thresholds (HIGH >50, MEDIUM 1-50, LOW <1 mg/mL) are explicitly defined in the task description.
